use_cases: AI assistant chat interfaces for SaaS applications requiring user input
Developer tools with integrated AI chat for code assistance and debugging
Content creation platforms with AI-powered chat for brainstorming and drafting
Customer support systems with animated, engaging AI bot interactions
Educational platforms with AI tutors providing interactive learning experiences
ai_summary: An animated AI chat interface component featuring auto-resizing textarea input, smooth motion animations using Framer Motion, and a polished gradient visual style. The component supports command suggestions, file attachments, and various media inputs through Lucide icons. Designed for seamless integration in SaaS and dev-tool applications requiring modern, engaging AI conversational interfaces.
